summary: Strong show with a memorable Bertha > Good Lovin' sequence captured on early audience FO​B tape; recording is decent and atmospheric.
review: Both reviewers are enthusiastic about the performance, especially the Bertha into Good Lovin' stretch, and they appreciate the historic effort of the original audience tapers. The source appears to be an early audience FOB recording – clear enough to hear a mic stand in the crowd but without detailed technical critique.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive comments about the show and no complaints on sound suggest a good experience, but only two brief reviews limit certainty about recording fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Early audience FOB tape; clear enough to notice a mic stand in the crowd during Good Lovin', indicating decent but raw capture of the performance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlight a fun, high‑energy flow with the Bertha > Good Lovin' transition standing out.
